_meta.purpose: Non-NAIA programs (D1/D2/D3 + JUCOs) that NAIA teams can schedule for non-conference games. Strength values feed nonNaiaToUniversal() in nwbbRating.js for cross-division ratings.
_meta.scope: Comprehensive D1/D2/D3 + PNW JUCO. Generated via scripts/gm/generate_non_naia_teams.js — edit the script to add/tune teams.
_meta.fields: Strength rating (-15 to +15 scale) determines sim outcomes + universal-strength rating. Tier-aware: a D1 at strength 10 outranks a D2 at strength 10.
_meta.sourceNotes: D1/D2/D3 strength values are best-effort estimates from widely-known program reputation, NOT actual PEAR data (PEAR publishes for those divisions but our local data file only has NAIA). Swap in real PEAR values when available.
